violations.text: The gasket of the hot-hold unit was observed with a frayed gasket. New Violation. Correct By: 03/24/2026
The pipes connecting to the hand sink was observed with a leak. A plumbing system shall be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2026

The wall behind the cooking equipment (flat top) has an accumulation of soil residue. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2026

The following was observed in poor repair: 1) The tiles around the drain in the ware-washing room was observed to be cracked 2) The tiles next to the steam kettles were observed to be cracked New Violation. Correct By: 03/24/2026

Bowls are being used as scoops in containers of dry ingredients. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the slicer have an accumulation of food debris. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of biofilm. New Violation. Correct By: 01/24/2024
